commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves five script-test files into QA Lab e2e paths, adds matching QA scenario YAML, and updates changed-test routing for the migrated script surfaces.

PR surface: Tests +36, Other +151. Total +187 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect from source: the added YAML invokes `test/e2e/...e2e.test.ts`, and a read-only helper probe shows `run-vitest` rewrites that path to `--config test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts` with `--passWithNoTests=false`. I did not run the full Vitest command because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow runner/config routing defect blocks the PR's central QA scenario execution path, so a focused repair is safe if a maintainer promotes it.

target.title: test: fold script coverage into QA scenarios
target.body:
## Summary
- move five RFC #10 candidates out of `test/scripts` into QA-owned e2e tests under `test/e2e/qa-lab`
- update the matching QA scenario YAML files so `qa suite` executes the migrated e2e tests instead of `test/scripts`
- update changed-test routing so edits to the covered scripts select the new QA e2e tests

## Coverage Notes
- adds new primary QA scenario evidence for existing taxonomy IDs `outbound-direct-text-media-sends`, `health-apis`, and `docker-e2e-package-artifact-generation`
- adds additional primary evidence for already-covered `telemetry.otel` and `plugins.lifecycle`
- current profile scorecard totals remain unchanged because the new-only IDs are outside `smoke-ci`/`release`, while the in-profile IDs already had primary evidence

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/gateway-smoke.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/channels/channel-message-flows.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/package-openclaw-for-docker.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/plugins/plugin-lifecycle-probe.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --scenario gateway-smoke --scenario channel-message-flows --scenario package-openclaw-for-docker --scenario plugin-lifecycle-probe --scenario qa-otel-smoke --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/script-elimination-batch`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --json > .artifacts/qa-coverage-script-elimination-batch.json`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 qa/scenarios/channels/channel-message-flows.yaml qa/scenarios/plugins/plugin-lifecycle-probe.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/gateway-smoke.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/package-openclaw-for-docker.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.yaml scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/channels/channel-message-flows.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/plugins/plugin-lifecycle-probe.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/gateway-smoke.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/package-openclaw-for-docker.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review the revised RFC #10 script-elimination batch. The intent is to remove five test/scripts files by moving their proof into QA/e2e tests under test/e2e/qa-lab, update QA scenario YAML execution paths, and keep changed-test routing aligned. Focus on stale references, test classification, QA evidence behavior, and whether the migration genuinely eliminates the script-test files instead of pointing QA scenarios at test/scripts. Ignore generated artifacts under .artifacts and node_modules."`

Known local warning during QA commands: existing state migration warning for `.openclaw/plugins/installs.json.migrated` already being present.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
